label: Native Install — System Wide
description: Install Canva Linux natively outside the Flatpak sandbox.
warning: Administrator authorization is required before the process starts.

label: Native Install — Current User
description: Install Canva Linux natively for the current user.

label: Flatpak Install — System Wide
description: Build and install Canva Linux locally as a Flatpak.
warning: Administrator authorization is required before the process starts.

label: Flatpak Install — Current User
description: Build and install Canva Linux locally as a Flatpak for the current user.
warning: User-scope Flatpak install may duplicate desktop entries, runtimes or app visibility.

label: Create .flatpak package
description: Create a distributable .flatpak package.

label: Create AppImage
description: Create an experimental AppImage package.

label: Prepare AUR/PKGBUILD
description: Prepare AUR/PKGBUILD packaging. Planned for a later npm-compatible packaging line.

label: Create .deb package
description: .deb package generation is planned after AUR packaging stabilization.

label: Create .rpm package
description: .rpm package generation is planned after AUR packaging stabilization.

label: Build runtime
description: Build the Electron runtime artifacts for local development workflows.

label: Build Electron linux-unpacked dir
description: Build the Electron linux-unpacked directory for packaging steps.

label: Validate project
description: Run the full project validation pipeline for code, docs, and packaging checks.

label: Validate AppImage artifacts
description: Run AppImage artifact validation checks.

label: Validate AppImage extraction
description: Run AppImage artifact validation including extraction checks.

label: Doctor / check host tools
description: Check host tooling and environment prerequisites.

label: Clean generated artifacts
description: Remove generated build and packaging artifacts.

label: Show detected installs/artifacts
description: Show detected installation variants and generated artifacts.

label: Show package/version information
description: Display project identity, version, and phase information.

label: Reset user data
confirmationMessage: This will erase login, session, cookies, cache and local Canva Linux data.
description: Erase login/session/cache and local Canva Linux data.
Uninstall Native Install variant from system-wide scope.
confirmationMessage: This will uninstall the system-wide Native Install variant.
label: Uninstall Native Install — System Wide

description: Uninstall Native Install variant for current user.
confirmationMessage: This will uninstall the current-user Native Install variant.
label: Uninstall Native Install — Current User

description: Uninstall Flatpak Install variant from system-wide scope.
confirmationMessage: This will uninstall the system-wide Flatpak Install variant.
label: Uninstall Flatpak Install — System Wide

description: Uninstall Flatpak Install variant for current user.
confirmationMessage: This will uninstall the current-user Flatpak Install variant.
label: Uninstall Flatpak Install — Current User
Uninstall detected installations
description: Uninstall detected Native/Flatpak variants. AppImage artifacts are generated files and are removed by Clean generated artifacts.
confirmationMessage: Uninstall detected Native/Flatpak variants. AppImage artifacts are generated files and are removed by Clean generated artifacts.

label: Purge all installations and user data
confirmationMessage: This will uninstall detected variants and remove login/session/cache/user data.
description: Uninstall Native/Flatpak variants and remove user data. Generated package artifacts are not installation variants.

label: Fix build directory permissions
description: Restore ownership of generated build directories to the current user.
